diff: Spark may update approved assets, risk parameters, and other details of the Offchain Collateralized Lending program via governance. If a previously issued loan no longer conforms with Spark’s current operational mandate due to a non-emergency parameter update, Spark will recall the loan at the earliest possible opportunity, while respecting the agreed loan duration.
description: This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section A.AG1.2.2.P6.2.1.2.1.1.1 of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance adopt the following operational processes and mandate for allocating funds to offchain collateralized lending arrangements.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
